notes: Session expired or absent.
Auth Worker bindings are missing or invalid; names the configuration class only.
Session expired.
Session invalid.
Fresh re-authentication required.
No eligible MFA factor enrolled (ADR-0032).
Missing Authorization Scope.
GitHub Actions OIDC audience does not match configured trust.
GitHub Actions OIDC repository claim does not match configured trust.
GitHub Actions OIDC environment claim does not match configured trust.
GitHub Actions OIDC token failed verification or issuer trust.
Environment Deploy Key secret failed verification or runtime policy key is not allowlisted.
Environment Deploy Key is disabled.
Environment Deploy Key is not authorized for the requested project and environment.
Environment Deploy Key credential scopes exceed the Runtime Injection bundle.
Step-up handoff, not a failure (ADR-0032).
Device-authorization user code expired before approval; re-run `insecur login --device` (ADR-0010).
Device-authorization request was denied at the verification page (ADR-0010).

Validation of an opaque resource ID (server-side, plus CLI-side argument parsing). CLI remediation carries a `suggestedFix` to copy the full id from `--json` or `--full` output instead of the truncated table cell.
Server-side Variable Key format validation.
CLI `run` missing or invalid command after `--`; API request-body validation (PKCE exchange, run-completed `childExitCode`).
Server-side Display Name validation.
Server-side empty Display Name validation.
CLI Profile Slug must be lower-kebab.
CLI Profile slug or opaque ID does not exist in local user config.
CLI Profile Slug already exists in local user config.
Display Name Resolution found zero exact matches in the scoped list (ADR-0035).
Display Name Resolution found two or more exact matches in the scoped list (ADR-0035).
Parent Organization, Project, or Environment scope is not pinned before child Display Name Resolution.
Irreversible or destructive action requires an opaque ID for non-interactive callers (ADR-0035).
Configured or explicit opaque ID is absent from the refreshed Scoped List in the authorized scope.
CLI argument parsing failure: unknown command, unknown option, missing required option, or invalid option value. Remediation carries the corrected `usage` invocation and a `suggestedFix`.
Unexpected client-side CLI failure after argument parsing. Remediation carries a `suggestedFix` pointing at `--verbose` for full error detail.
Design-partner feedback kind is not one of the supported metadata-only values.
Design-partner feedback note must be one of the supported metadata-only note codes.
Design-partner feedback must reference a grant, operation, or request ID.
Design-partner feedback references an operation or request ID that does not exist in the Organization.
Secret value input is required; remediation carries the `secrets set <VARIABLE_KEY> --value-stdin` usage and a `suggestedFix` (mentioning `--generate random` only for minting a new random secret).
Mutually exclusive or unsupported Secret input mode options.
Resource-shaped denial; URL environment not owned by URL project collapses with not-found into HTTP `404` so the write path is not an existence oracle.
Environment lifecycle stage is not a supported posture tier.
Non-protected secret writes are blocked for Protected Environments.
Protected draft secret writes are blocked for non-Protected Environments.
Lifecycle stage and protected posture cannot change after creation.
Preview opt-down evidence is invalid or scoped to the wrong lifecycle stage.
Environment not found for the tenant-qualified coordinate.
Personal Organization already provisioned.
Guided-provisioning resource conflict.
Acting user is not the Instance Operator for the requested action.
Invitation input or role preset is invalid.
Invitation is not pending or lost a compare-and-set race.
Accepting user does not match the invitation invitee.
Invitee already holds membership for the invitation scope.
Instance bootstrap already completed.
Instance is not bootstrapped.
No pending Bootstrap Operator Claim or default team is missing.
Bootstrap Operator Claim is already consumed.
Bootstrap Secret verification failed.
Bootstrap claim requires a WorkOS-resolved human actor.
Runtime configuration unavailable; control-plane state, not caller input.
Transient database connection-layer failure (Hyperdrive pool exhaustion, server shutdown, connection loss); safe to retry after a short delay.
Storage Security Gate blocked production delivery before decrypt or provider write.
Storage Security Gate readiness evidence is missing or unreachable for production delivery.
Opaque single failure; HTTP `500` must not differentiate by cause ([ADR-0062](adr/0062-package-seam-failures-are-errorbody-compatible.md) amendment).
Instance root key material is not configured.
Active tenant data keys are missing or not usable; control-plane readiness, not caller input.
Additional authenticated data field failed charset validation.
Audit event payload failed metadata validation.
Audit export time range matches more entries than a single export bundle allows; narrow the range and retry.
Cleared challenge evidence is absent; fail closed to fresh step-up (ADR-0032).
Challenge evidence validity window elapsed; fresh step-up required (ADR-0032).
Challenge evidence is not bound to the requested operation.
Clearing user is not authorized for this bounded operation.
Single-use challenge evidence was already consumed.
Clearing user lacks scope or operation state rejects clearing.
WorkOS session assurance did not satisfy fresh high-assurance factor posture (INS-49).
Unknown or malformed high-assurance risk reason code.
Public-edge abuse control; retry after the configured window.
Existing-secret conflict in the target Environment (preflight or create-only write).
Dotenv line does not split into key=value.
Duplicate final Variable Key in the import source.
Runtime Injection Policy or version not found for the tenant-qualified coordinate.
Policy Display Name already exists in the target Environment.
Policy bindings are missing, duplicate, or not exact opaque IDs / Variable Keys.
Wildcard, prefix, suffix, regex, tag, folder, or other broad secret selection is rejected.
Bound secret ID does not exist in the policy's organization and project scope.

Bound secret ID exists in the organization but belongs to a different Environment than the policy. `400` (not `404`) is a deliberate intra-tenant carve-out per ADR-0062: the configurer is already scope-authorized, so distinguishing wrong-env from not-found is not an existence oracle.
Used Runtime Injection Policy Versions cannot be mutated.
Protected Environment policy use blocked until machine custody and Storage Security Gate readiness are satisfied.
Runtime Injection Policy is disabled.
Integrity failure; never silently retried.
Resource-shaped denial; HTTP `404` so it is not a resource-existence oracle, even though the exit differs.
Retryable.
Approval Request stays pending.
Approval Request not found for the tenant-qualified ID.
Approval Request is not pending or lost a compare-and-set race.
Promote body lists Draft Version IDs that are missing, not draft, or not in the target Environment.
Wildcard or all-staged draft selection tokens are rejected at the API edge.
Promotion Change Set is immutable after the Approval Request is created.
Rollback target version is not a retained published version eligible for copy.
Draft Version Discard target is not found, or is not currently a draft (already promoted or discarded elsewhere).
Operation not found for the tenant-qualified ID.
Same idempotency key reused with a different intent code (ADR-0066).
Unknown or malformed operation intent code.
Metadata-only progress or lease input failed validation.
Compare-and-set transition lost a concurrent state change.
State transition is not allowed by the operation state machine.
Operation is already in a terminal state.
Operation in the current state cannot be canceled.
Operation in the current state cannot be retried.
`operations wait --timeout` expired before the operation left a non-terminal state; remediation points back at the same wait command.
Sync target lease fencing token is stale or does not match the operation binding.
No active sync target lease exists for the requested target.
Sync target lease fencing token is required for this operation transition.
App Connection not found for the tenant-qualified ID.
App Connection ID or unique setup constraint already exists.
App Connection is disconnected; sync execution fails closed until reconnected.
App Connection requires provider reauthorization before sync execution.
App Connection setup is incomplete; sync execution fails closed.
Required Provider App Registration is missing for the Instance and connection method.
Credential-backed App Connection lacks an active encrypted provider credential.
Cloudflare scoped-token validation failed; connection remains non-writeable until current evidence succeeds.
Cloudflare token scope does not match the pinned account or Worker script boundary.
App Connection operation targets an unsupported provider or connection method.
Secret Sync not found for the tenant-qualified ID.
Secret Sync is disabled and cannot execute.
Secret Sync binding set failed validation.
Pattern, wildcard, or inventory-based bindings are rejected.
Bound secret not found in the source Environment.
Bound secret belongs to a different Environment.
Provider destination or target configuration is invalid.
Secret Sync ID or unique setup constraint already exists.
App Connection is not eligible for this Secret Sync.
Display name already used by another Secret Sync in scope.
Webhook subscription event type is missing or not selectable.
Webhook subscription not found for the tenant-qualified ID.
Event notification delivery failed for a subscribed webhook.
Active webhook signing secret is missing for delivery or rotation.
Provider App Registration not found for the Instance and connection method.
Provider App Registration exists but instance setup is incomplete.
Provider App Registration already exists for the Instance and connection method.
Protected Change not found for the tenant-qualified ID.
State transition is not allowed by the Protected Change state machine.
Protected Change is already in a terminal state.
Another active Protected Change already exists for the Protected Environment.
Required approval evidence metadata is missing.
Acting credential is not the Protected Change requester.
Protected Changes require a Protected Environment.
The requested target falls outside the pinned Connection Boundary; fix the configuration, not the provider.
Validation-side pre-write failure.
Validation-side pre-write failure.
Provider-side `action_required` failure; needs reauthorization or an approved configuration change.
Retryable lease contention.
Warning code; exits `2` only when required operation-scoped confirmation is absent, otherwise the run proceeds.
Warning code on a `completed_with_warnings` operation; not a failure.
Hosted-only capability invoked in Local Mode; remediation carries exact upgrade commands.

No supported OS credential store is available. Local Mode fails closed instead of silently storing its root key beside ciphertext; remediation explains Linux Secret Service setup and the explicit development-only opt-in.
Second-machine auto-adopt reports Variable Keys without local values; remediation lists exact `secrets set` commands.
Remote Secret exists but possession check failed during migrate reconcile; nothing written.
Server-side possession check verdict: candidate value does not match stored Secret; metadata-only, no digests or similarity scores.
